response.justification: Bogdan possesses the required 15 years of software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial drive through his open-source work. However, he lacks the deep, recognized expertise in Artificial Intelligence, machine learning, and strategic cloud advisory expected for a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. His recent, brief exposure to AI tooling does not align with the high-level strategic requirements of this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack and infrastructure domains.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder of an open-source platform (GISCollective).
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and polyglot programming.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and strategic leadership required for the role.
Missing experience operating at a Director-level capacity to advise strategic enterprise customers.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
